CheckBeforeCreateInstance.zone: Availability zone, e.g. ZoneA, ZoneB, etc.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.vpcId: VPC (short ID) where the RapidFS instance resides
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.subnetId: Subnet (short ID) where the RapidFS instance resides
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.managedMode: Deployment mode of the RapidFS instance. Enum values: * FullyManaged: Fully managed mode, suitable for businesses without idle storage resources, at ultra-large scale, or requiring high stability. In this mode, RapidFS fully manages the instance with no user O&M required. * MasterManaged: Master-managed mode, suitable for businesses with idle storage resources, cost sensitivity, and certain O&M capabilities.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.metaSpec: Metadata specification. Currently effective only in MasterManaged mode. Enum values: * M1: Suitable for scenarios with up to 1 billion files, up to 50 cache nodes, and up to 4 data disks mountable per cache node. * M2: Suitable for scenarios with up to 5 billion files, up to 400 cache nodes, and up to 8 data disks mountable per cache node.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.dataSpec: Data specification. Currently effective only in FullyManaged mode. Enum values: * Basic: Data performance baseline of 100 MB/s/TiB. * Capacity: Data performance baseline of 200 MB/s/TiB.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.type: Cache access type managed by the user in MasterManaged mode. Valid only in MasterManaged mode. Enum values: * BCC: Cloud server BCC, cache nodes deployed directly on BCC instances. * IDC: Self-built data center, cache nodes deployed directly on user IDC servers. * CCE: Cloud Container Engine, cache nodes deployed as containers in a CCE cluster. * K8S: Self-managed Kubernetes, cache nodes deployed as containers in an in-house EKS or self-built K8s cluster. * AIHC: AI Heterogeneous Compute (Baihe AIHC), cache nodes deployed as containers in an AIHC cluster; currently only fully managed AIHC resource pools are supported.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.capacityTiB: Required in FullyManaged mode. Specifies the purchased cache capacity in TiB. Must not exceed the maximum purchasable capacity returned by the DescribeSpecs API.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.cceClusterId: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is CCE. Specifies the CCE cluster ID.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.aihcResourcePoolId: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is AIHC. Specifies the AIHC fully managed resource pool ID.
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.k8sControllerId: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is K8S. Specifies the RapidFS cache controller ID within the K8s cluster. Retrieve it after controller installation via: `kubectl get cm -n kube-system rapidfs-cache-service-config -o yaml`
CheckBeforeCreateInstance.k8sControllerToken: Required in MasterManaged mode when the cache access type is K8S. Specifies the RapidFS cache controller token within the K8s cluster. Retrieve it after controller installation via: `kubectl get cm -n kube-system rapidfs-cache-service-config -o yaml`. Must be encrypted using the secret key corresponding to the request header x-bce-accesskey. See the password encryption transmission specification for details. Refer to the aes128_encrypt_16char_key() function in the bce-python-sdk.
